decisions.rationale: Confirmed in brownfield React paths: useSessionCompletionRoute only reads and clears SESSION_SEARCH_PARAM; no PathDetailPopup or EnrollmentFloatingBar action calls setSearchParams with enrollment.currentSessionId. PATHS-03 triage anticipated PATHS-07 would wire bTJCv Continue Path session-navigation, but PATHS-07 decompose scope and AC-1..AC-3 obligate overlay mount, ?session= match against bTItY store currentSessionId, and submit/clear param only — not bTJCv footer CTA or chip navigation. criteria_audit, functional_audit FV-1/FV-4, and ui_evidence all pass at 100%; review ok=true. Overlay is reachable via direct ?session= deep link. PATHS-07 is the terminal MOD-DRSAM-PATHS item with no downstream depends_on gate on entry navigation. Defer bTJCv footer CTA and optional floating-bar chip ?session= setter to a paths navigation polish follow-up (PATHS-03 footer chrome + PATHS-06 enrollment strip).

SessionCompletionRoute.tsx renders null inside bTJAB when loading finishes and fetchPathSession returns null (bad id, catalog miss, or fetch error) — valid UX gap but outside PATHS-07 AC-1..AC-3, which require DS-04 mount with resolved pathsession when visible/matched, not error/retry chrome. criteria_audit AC-1 passes on happy path; functional FV-2 passes on catalog/Supabase resolution. Defer inline error state with dismiss/back-to-paths and optional invalid-param clear as session-overlay polish when paths navigation (C-1) lands.

AC-3 explicitly scopes a frontend bTJCM ScheduleAPIEvent stub; pathsSessionApi.ts documents stub boundary and logs handler id. incrementModulesCompletedCount is acceptable prototype side effect; full Bubble bTJBW pathanswer insert and enrollment current_session progression require supabase pathanswer/pathenrollment tables not in PATHS-07 scope (no project/ migrations). functional FV-4 and criteria_audit AC-3 pass. Defer pathanswer persistence and enrollment session advance to a later backend/API integration wave when tables or edge functions are available.

PATHS-07 layout_notes state the page item handles routing, data bind, and submit orchestration only — not separate overlay presentation tokens. Named ui_refs bTJAG/bTJAB/bTIyi/bTItY pass ui_evidence; bTJDe parent presentation is not an enumerated ui_ref or AC marker. Generic flex/skeleton wrapper is acceptable per decompose page-orchestration boundary. Defer bTJDe/bTJAG full-width overlay token resolution from ir/slices/bTHDg____root.json or styles.json to optional pixel-parity polish if tooling flags deltas.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 bTJCv/?session= entry navigation (paths-nav polish: PATHS-03 footer + PATHS-06 chip); C-2 fetch-null empty-shell error UX; C-3 full bTJBW pathanswer/enrollment progression beyond bTJCM stub; C-4 bTJDe overlay presentation tokens (optional parity polish).
